MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-11-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:

Plaintiff NASIR PATEL, is present IN PRO PRER
Defendant STACEY COYLE, is present.
Attorney MEGAN KIEFER, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem ORA PROCHOVNICK , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502A , for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of MAY 16, 2011 is vacated.
